allow: PowerShell($connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($connections\) { $connections | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Processos encerrados" } else { Write-Host "Porta 3000 livre" })

PowerShell($connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($connections\) { $connections | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Host "Feito")
